description: 10 complex mixed-intent queries for evaluating decompose_with_zeroshot. Each case defines quality criteria the decomposition must satisfy.

quality_axes.route_validity: Every sub-task route must be 'sql' or 'text' (never 'hybrid' or other).
quality_axes.atomicity: Each sub-task should address a single intent; no sub-task should mix sql+text signals.
quality_axes.coverage: The union of sub-task queries must address all key concepts in the original query.
quality_axes.no_raw_sql: sub_query fields must be natural-language questions, not raw SQL statements.
quality_axes.count_ok: Number of sub-tasks must be between min_subtasks and max_subtasks.

test_cases.query: How many orders were placed last month and what does the return policy document say about eligible items?
test_cases.description: Two clean intents: a COUNT aggregation and a policy document lookup.

test_cases.query: What is the total revenue by region for Q3 2023 and can you summarize the regional expansion strategy from the business plan?
test_cases.description: SUM aggregation by region (SQL) + summarization of a strategy document (text).

test_cases.query: Count active subscriptions by pricing tier and explain the upgrade process described in the user guide.
test_cases.description: COUNT with GROUP BY (SQL) + procedure explanation from a document (text).

test_cases.query: Which products have the highest profit margin and what does the procurement policy document say about sole-source vendors?
How many employees had overtime hours last quarter and what does the overtime compensation policy specify about weekend rates?
Show the average transaction value by sales channel and summarize the go-to-market strategy described in the Q4 planning document, then also list the top five customers by lifetime value.
test_cases.description: Three intents: AVG by channel (SQL), document summary (text), and TOP-N customer query (SQL). Tests 3-way split.

test_cases.query: How many support tickets were escalated to tier-2 last week and what are the escalation guidelines described in the SLA document?
test_cases.description: COUNT with filter (SQL) + SLA document retrieval (text).

test_cases.query: What percentage of new users converted to paid plans in Q2 and what does the onboarding guide say about the activation checklist?
test_cases.description: Conversion rate calculation (SQL) + onboarding document retrieval (text).

test_cases.query: Which five branches had the lowest net sales last year and what turnaround strategies does the operations manual recommend for underperforming locations?
How many new hires joined each department this year, what does the HR policy say about probation periods, and which departments had the highest attrition rate last year?
test_cases.description: Three intents: headcount by department (SQL), HR policy lookup (text), attrition ranking (SQL). Tests clean 3-way split.
